name: HRA_EVALUATIONS_R10
query: SELECT HRA_EVALUATIONS.EVALUATION_ID EVALUATION_ID, HRA_EVALUATIONS.USE_CALC_RATINGS_FLAG USE_CALC_RATINGS_FLAG, HRA_EVALUATIONS.BUSINESS_GROUP_ID BUSINESS_GROUP_ID, HRA_EVALUATIONS.TEMPLATE_DEFN_ID TEMPLATE_DEFN_ID, HRA_EVALUATIONS.TMPL_PERIOD_ID TMPL_PERIOD_ID, HRA_EVALUATIONS.WORKER_ID WORKER_ID, HRA_EVALUATIONS.MANAGER_ID MANAGER_ID, HRA_EVALUATIONS.ASSIGNMENT_ID ASSIGNMENT_ID, HRA_EVALUATIONS.LANGUAGE_CODE LANGUAGE_CODE, HRA_EVALUATIONS.LOCKED_BY_USER_ID LOCKED_BY_USER_ID, HRA_EVALUATIONS.STATUS_CODE STATUS_CODE, HRA_EVALUATIONS.PREV_STATUS_CODE PREV_STATUS_CODE, HRA_EVALUATIONS.START_DATE START_DATE, HRA_EVALUATIONS.END_DATE END_DATE, HRA_EVALUATIONS.EVALUATION_DATE EVALUATION_DATE, HRA_EVALUATIONS.SELECT_MANAGER_ALLOWED_FLAG SELECT_MANAGER_ALLOWED_FLAG, CASE WHEN EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM HRA_EVAL_SECTIONS WHERE HRA_EVAL_SECTIONS.EVALUATION_ID = HRA_EVALUATIONS.EVALUATION_ID AND HRA_EVAL_SECTIONS.BUSINESS_GROUP_ID = HRA_EVALUATIONS.BUSINESS_GROUP_ID AND SECTION_TYPE_CODE = 'OS') THEN (SELECT ROUNDING_RULE_CODE FROM HRA_EVAL_SECTIONS WHERE HRA_EVAL_SECTIONS.EVALUATION_ID = HRA_EVALUATIONS.EVALUATION_ID AND HRA_EVAL_SECTIONS.BUSINESS_GROUP_ID = HRA_EVALUATIONS.BUSINESS_GROUP_ID AND SECTION_TYPE_CODE = 'OS') WHEN EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM HRA_EVAL_SECTIONS WHERE HRA_EVAL_SECTIONS.EVALUATION_ID = HRA_EVALUATIONS.EVALUATION_ID AND HRA_EVAL_SECTIONS.BUSINESS_GROUP_ID = HRA_EVALUATIONS.BUSINESS_GROUP_ID AND SECTION_TYPE_CODE = 'REG') THEN (SELECT ROUNDING_RULE_CODE FROM HRA_EVAL_SECTIONS WHERE HRA_EVAL_SECTIONS.EVALUATION_ID = HRA_EVALUATIONS.EVALUATION_ID AND HRA_EVAL_SECTIONS.BUSINESS_GROUP_ID = HRA_EVALUATIONS.BUSINESS_GROUP_ID AND SECTION_TYPE_CODE = 'REG') WHEN EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM HRA_EVAL_SECTIONS WHERE HRA_EVAL_SECTIONS.EVALUATION_ID = HRA_EVALUATIONS.EVALUATION_ID AND HRA_EVAL_SECTIONS.BUSINESS_GROUP_ID = HRA_EVALUATIONS.BUSINESS_GROUP_ID AND SECTION_TYPE_CODE = 'GOAL') THEN (SELECT ROUNDING_RULE_CODE FROM HRA_EVAL_SECTIONS WHERE HRA_EVAL_SECTIONS.EVALUATION_ID = HRA_EVALUATIONS.EVALUATION_ID AND HRA_EVAL_SECTIONS.BUSINESS_GROUP_ID = HRA_EVALUATIONS.BUSINESS_GROUP_ID AND SECTION_TYPE_CODE = 'GOAL') ELSE NULL END ROUNDING_RULE_CODE, CASE WHEN EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM HRA_EVAL_SECTIONS WHERE HRA_EVAL_SECTIONS.EVALUATION_ID = HRA_EVALUATIONS.EVALUATION_ID AND HRA_EVAL_SECTIONS.BUSINESS_GROUP_ID = HRA_EVALUATIONS.BUSINESS_GROUP_ID AND SECTION_TYPE_CODE = 'OS') THEN (SELECT DECIMAL_PLACES FROM HRA_EVAL_SECTIONS WHERE HRA_EVAL_SECTIONS.EVALUATION_ID = HRA_EVALUATIONS.EVALUATION_ID AND HRA_EVAL_SECTIONS.BUSINESS_GROUP_ID = HRA_EVALUATIONS.BUSINESS_GROUP_ID AND SECTION_TYPE_CODE = 'OS') WHEN EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM HRA_EVAL_SECTIONS WHERE HRA_EVAL_SECTIONS.EVALUATION_ID = HRA_EVALUATIONS.EVALUATION_ID AND HRA_EVAL_SECTIONS.BUSINESS_GROUP_ID = HRA_EVALUATIONS.BUSINESS_GROUP_ID AND SECTION_TYPE_CODE = 'REG') THEN (SELECT DECIMAL_PLACES FROM HRA_EVAL_SECTIONS WHERE HRA_EVAL_SECTIONS.EVALUATION_ID = HRA_EVALUATIONS.EVALUATION_ID AND HRA_EVAL_SECTIONS.BUSINESS_GROUP_ID = HRA_EVALUATIONS.BUSINESS_GROUP_ID AND SECTION_TYPE_CODE = 'REG') WHEN EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM HRA_EVAL_SECTIONS WHERE HRA_EVAL_SECTIONS.EVALUATION_ID = HRA_EVALUATIONS.EVALUATION_ID AND HRA_EVAL_SECTIONS.BUSINESS_GROUP_ID = HRA_EVALUATIONS.BUSINESS_GROUP_ID AND SECTION_TYPE_CODE = 'GOAL') THEN (SELECT DECIMAL_PLACES FROM HRA_EVAL_SECTIONS WHERE HRA_EVAL_SECTIONS.EVALUATION_ID = HRA_EVALUATIONS.EVALUATION_ID AND HRA_EVAL_SECTIONS.BUSINESS_GROUP_ID = HRA_EVALUATIONS.BUSINESS_GROUP_ID AND SECTION_TYPE_CODE = 'GOAL') ELSE NULL END DECIMAL_PLACES, HRA_EVALUATIONS.CALCULATION_RATINGS_FLAG CALCULATION_RATINGS_FLAG, CASE WHEN EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM HRA_EVAL_SECTIONS WHERE HRA_EVAL_SECTIONS.EVALUATION_ID = HRA_EVALUATIONS.EVALUATION_ID AND HRA_EVAL_SECTIONS.BUSINESS_GROUP_ID = HRA_EVALUATIONS.BUSINESS_GROUP_ID AND SECTION_TYPE_CODE = 'OS') THEN (SELECT MAPPING_METHOD_CODE FROM HRA_EVAL_SECTIONS WHERE HRA_EVAL_SECTIONS.EVALUATION_ID = HRA_EVALUATIONS.EVALUATION_ID AND HRA_EVAL_SECTIONS.BUSINESS_GROUP_ID = HRA_EVALUATIONS.BUSINESS_GROUP_ID AND SECTION_TYPE_CODE = 'OS') WHEN EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM HRA_EVAL_SECTIONS WHERE HRA_EVAL_SECTIONS.EVALUATION_ID = HRA_EVALUATIONS.EVALUATION_ID AND HRA_EVAL_SECTIONS.BUSINESS_GROUP_ID = HRA_EVALUATIONS.BUSINESS_GROUP_ID AND SECTION_TYPE_CODE = 'REG') THEN (SELECT MAPPING_METHOD_CODE FROM HRA_EVAL_SECTIONS WHERE HRA_EVAL_SECTIONS.EVALUATION_ID = HRA_EVALUATIONS.EVALUATION_ID AND HRA_EVAL_SECTIONS.BUSINESS_GROUP_ID = HRA_EVALUATIONS.BUSINESS_GROUP_ID AND SECTION_TYPE_CODE = 'REG') WHEN EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM HRA_EVAL_SECTIONS WHERE HRA_EVAL_SECTIONS.EVALUATION_ID = HRA_EVALUATIONS.EVALUATION_ID AND HRA_EVAL_SECTIONS.BUSINESS_GROUP_ID = HRA_EVALUATIONS.BUSINESS_GROUP_ID AND SECTION_TYPE_CODE = 'GOAL') THEN (SELECT MAPPING_METHOD_CODE FROM HRA_EVAL_SECTIONS WHERE HRA_EVAL_SECTIONS.EVALUATION_ID = HRA_EVALUATIONS.EVALUATION_ID AND
